rootCause: Quest completable checks treated obtainable items as monotonic and did not model prerequisite chains that consume non-renewable gate items. This missed order-sensitive sibling quest conflicts where one branch can consume a scarce item required by another unlocked quest.
resolution: Added a regression test that computes non-renewable quest gate items, expands quest prerequisite closures, and fails when optional prerequisite chains can consume sibling quest gate items after shared prerequisites. This catches the completionist catalog/reminder pattern and similar future ordering hazards.
